code:
export class InventoryMessageParser{constructor(){this._items=[];}flush(){this._items=[];return true;}parse(wrapper){const total=wrapper.readInt();const allowedTypes=['weapon','shield','potion','food','drink','tool'];const allowedRarities=['common','uncommon','rare','epic','legendary'];for(let i=0;i<total;i++){const id=wrapper.readInt();//1 
const item_id=wrapper.readInt();//2
const user_id=wrapper.readInt();//3
const slot=wrapper.readInt();//4 
const quantity=wrapper.readInt();//5
const durability=wrapper.readInt();//6
const iconPath=wrapper.readString();//7
const name=wrapper.readString();//8
const item_type_raw=wrapper.readString();//9
const item_type=allowedTypes.includes(item_type_raw)?item_type_raw:'tool';// default fallback
const rarityRaw=wrapper.readString();// 10
const rarity=allowedRarities.includes(rarityRaw)?rarityRaw:'common';// default fallback
const damage=wrapper.readInt();//11
const defense=wrapper.readInt();//12
const healing=wrapper.readInt();//13
this._items.push({id,item_id,user_id,slot,quantity,durability,icon_path:iconPath,name,item_type,rarity,stats:{damage,defense,healing}});}return true;}get items(){return this._items;}}
